case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. GEORGE TRUONG ET AL

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66493875) TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUONG, GEORGE $5,632.30 PRINCIPAL, $309.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,941.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200032945)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66493875) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUONG, GEORGE DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2021

DECLARATION 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200032945) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
